summary: Verified all 5 critical bug fixes reported by user. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All bug fixes verified via Playwright and code review.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 (Google Auth redirect): VERIFIED - AuthCallback in App.js (lines 68-127) uses navigate('/dashboard', { replace: true }) instead of window.location.replace(). AuthModal.jsx line 35 sets redirect URL to /dashboard.

Bug 2 (Not Authenticated): VERIFIED - Bearer token auth works. auth_utils.py get_current_user() checks cookie, query param, then Bearer header (lines 13-42). Login returns session_token which is stored in localStorage. Logout endpoint (auth.py lines 274-286) also checks Bearer header.

Bug 3 (Print All): VERIFIED - buildPrintAllHtml() in CaseDetail.jsx (lines 729-821) now includes: Case Summary, Documents list, Timeline with full descriptions, Grounds with full details (supporting evidence, law sections, similar cases, deep analysis), Notes, and Progress analysis.
Bug 4 (iOS PDF view): VERIFIED - DocumentPreviewPage.jsx (lines 104-111) uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML for iOS devices instead of iframe srcDoc. isIOSDevice() utility detects iOS.
Bug 5 (AI-SUGGESTED badge): VERIFIED - UnverifiedBadge component in GroundsOfMerit.jsx (lines 90-94) shows 'AI-SUGGESTED' in blue (bg-blue-100 text-blue-700) instead of 'UNVERIFIED' in amber.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 critical bugs have been fixed and verified: (1) Google Auth now redirects to /dashboard via SPA navigation, (2) Bearer token auth works via localStorage session_token, (3) Print All includes full content with all sections, (4) iOS PDF view uses direct HTML render, (5) Similar Cases badge shows AI-SUGGESTED in blue. Backend auth flow fully tested with 13 passing tests.
